script: We have 85 minus 37! We can't take 7 from 5, so we'll regroup.
We borrowed one ten from the eight, which leaves seven tens. So let's bring our seven up
Let's bring that one ten over here. Now we have ten plus five, which is fifteen
Okay, fifteen minus seven equals eight, so let's drag our eight down here
Now in the tens place, seven minus three is four, so let's bring it down
So, eighty-five minus thirty-seven equals forty-eight! Awesome work on this problem
